-- Hoogle documentation, generated by Haddock
-- See Hoogle, http://www.haskell.org/hoogle/


-- | A from-scratch Haskell parser with lexer, syntax tree, and
--   pretty-printer. The package is validated with golden tests and
--   oracle-backed differential tests against GHC.
@package aihc-parser
@version 1.0.0.3


-- | Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) covering Haskell2010 plus all language
--   extensions.
module Aihc.Parser.Syntax

-- | An arithmetic sequence expression.
data ArithSeq

-- | Metadata for the whole arithmetic sequence (typically a
--   <a>SourceSpan</a> via <a>mkAnnotation</a>).
ArithSeqAnn :: Annotation -> ArithSeq -> ArithSeq

-- | <pre>
--   [expr ..]
--   </pre>
ArithSeqFrom :: Expr -> ArithSeq

-- | <pre>
--   [start, thenExpr ..]
--   </pre>
ArithSeqFromThen :: Expr -> Expr -> ArithSeq

-- | <pre>
--   [start .. end]
--   </pre>
ArithSeqFromTo :: Expr -> Expr -> ArithSeq

-- | <pre>
--   [start, thenExpr .. end]
--   </pre>
ArithSeqFromThenTo :: Expr -> Expr -> Expr -> ArithSeq

-- | The kind of a function arrow. <tt>ArrowUnrestricted</tt> is the
--   ordinary <tt>-&gt;</tt>. <tt>ArrowLinear</tt> is <tt>%1 -&gt;</tt> (or
--   its Unicode equivalent <tt>⊸</tt>). <tt>ArrowExplicit ty</tt> is
--   <tt>%m -&gt;</tt> for an arbitrary multiplicity type <tt>m</tt>.
data ArrowKind
ArrowUnrestricted :: ArrowKind
ArrowLinear :: ArrowKind
ArrowExplicit :: Type -> ArrowKind

-- | Arrow application type: first-order (<tt>-&lt;</tt>) or higher-order
--   (<tt>-&lt;&lt;</tt>).
data ArrAppType

-- | <pre>
--   f -&lt; x
--   </pre>
HsFirstOrderApp :: ArrAppType

-- | <pre>
--   f -&lt;&lt; x
--   </pre>
HsHigherOrderApp :: ArrAppType

-- | A field or constructor argument type with strictness/laziness markers.
--   Examples: <tt>a</tt>, <tt>!a</tt>, <tt>~a</tt>, and <tt>{-# UNPACK #-}
--   !Int</tt>.
data BangType
BangType :: [Annotation] -> [Pragma] -> Bool -> Bool -> Type -> BangType
[bangAnns] :: BangType -> [Annotation]
[bangPragmas] :: BangType -> [Pragma]
[bangStrict] :: BangType -> Bool
[bangLazy] :: BangType -> Bool
[bangType] :: BangType -> Type
type BinderName = UnqualifiedName

-- | The head of a declaration that binds a type constructor or class.
data BinderHead name

-- | <pre>
--   T a b
--   </pre>
PrefixBinderHead :: name -> [TyVarBinder] -> BinderHead name

-- | <pre>
--   a :+: b
--   </pre>
InfixBinderHead :: TyVarBinder -> name -> TyVarBinder -> [TyVarBinder] -> BinderHead name

-- | The calling convention used by a foreign declaration. Examples:
--   <tt>ccall</tt>, <tt>stdcall</tt>, <tt>capi</tt>, <tt>prim</tt>, and
--   <tt>javascript</tt>.
data CallConv

-- | <pre>
--   ccall
--   </pre>
CCall :: CallConv

-- | <pre>
--   stdcall
--   </pre>
StdCall :: CallConv

-- | <pre>
--   capi
--   </pre>
CApi :: CallConv

-- | <pre>
--   prim
--   </pre>
CPrim :: CallConv

-- | <pre>
--   javascript
--   </pre>
JavaScript :: CallConv

-- | One <tt>case</tt> or <tt>case</tt> alternative. Example: <tt>Just x
--   -&gt; x</tt>.
data CaseAlt body
CaseAlt :: [Annotation] -> Pattern -> Rhs body -> CaseAlt body
[caseAltAnns] :: CaseAlt body -> [Annotation]
[caseAltPattern] :: CaseAlt body -> Pattern
[caseAltRhs] :: CaseAlt body -> Rhs body

-- | A class declaration. Example: <tt>class (Eq a) =&gt; C a where f :: a
--   -&gt; Bool</tt>.
data ClassDecl
ClassDecl :: Maybe [Type] -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName -> [FunctionalDependency] -> [ClassDeclItem] -> ClassDecl
[classDeclContext] :: ClassDecl -> Maybe [Type]
[classDeclHead] :: ClassDecl -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName
[classDeclFundeps] :: ClassDecl -> [FunctionalDependency]
[classDeclItems] :: ClassDecl -> [ClassDeclItem]

-- | An item inside a class body.
data ClassDeclItem

-- | Metadata for the whole class item.
ClassItemAnn :: Annotation -> ClassDeclItem -> ClassDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   f :: a -&gt; Bool
--   </pre>
ClassItemTypeSig :: [BinderName] -> Type -> ClassDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   default f :: Show a =&gt; a -&gt; String
--   </pre>
ClassItemDefaultSig :: BinderName -> Type -> ClassDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   infixr 5 :+:
--   </pre>
ClassItemFixity :: FixityAssoc -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Maybe Int -> [OperatorName] -> ClassDeclItem

-- | A default method body such as <tt>f x = True</tt>.
ClassItemDefault :: ValueDecl -> ClassDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   type family F a
--   </pre>
ClassItemTypeFamilyDecl :: TypeFamilyDecl -> ClassDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   data family DF a
--   </pre>
ClassItemDataFamilyDecl :: DataFamilyDecl -> ClassDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   type F Int = Bool
--   </pre>
ClassItemDefaultTypeInst :: TypeFamilyInst -> ClassDeclItem

-- | A pragma inside the class body, such as <tt>{-# MINIMAL f #-}</tt>.
ClassItemPragma :: Pragma -> ClassDeclItem

-- | Arrow command type (used inside <tt>proc</tt> expressions). Commands
--   mirror expressions but live in a separate namespace so the
--   pretty-printer knows not to parenthesise <tt>do { … }</tt> as an infix
--   LHS.
data Cmd

-- | Metadata for the whole command (typically a <a>SourceSpan</a> via
--   <a>mkAnnotation</a>).
CmdAnn :: Annotation -> Cmd -> Cmd

-- | <tt>exp -&lt; exp</tt> or <tt>exp -&lt;&lt; exp</tt>
CmdArrApp :: Expr -> ArrAppType -> Expr -> Cmd

-- | Command-level infix: <tt>cmd1 op cmd2</tt>
CmdInfix :: Cmd -> Name -> Cmd -> Cmd

-- | <pre>
--   do { cstmts }
--   </pre>
CmdDo :: [DoStmt Cmd] -> Cmd

-- | <pre>
--   if exp then cmd else cmd
--   </pre>
CmdIf :: Expr -> Cmd -> Cmd -> Cmd

-- | <pre>
--   case exp of { calts }
--   </pre>
CmdCase :: Expr -> [CaseAlt Cmd] -> Cmd

-- | <pre>
--   let decls in cmd
--   </pre>
CmdLet :: [Decl] -> Cmd -> Cmd

-- | <pre>
--   \pats -&gt; cmd
--   </pre>
CmdLam :: [Pattern] -> Cmd -> Cmd

-- | Command application: <tt>cmd exp</tt>
CmdApp :: Cmd -> Expr -> Cmd

-- | Parenthesised command: <tt>(cmd)</tt>
CmdPar :: Cmd -> Cmd

-- | A statement inside a list comprehension.
data CompStmt

-- | Metadata for the whole comprehension statement (typically a
--   <a>SourceSpan</a> via <a>mkAnnotation</a>).
CompAnn :: Annotation -> CompStmt -> CompStmt

-- | <pre>
--   x &lt;- xs
--   </pre>
CompGen :: Pattern -> Expr -> CompStmt

-- | <pre>
--   x &gt; 0
--   </pre>
CompGuard :: Expr -> CompStmt

-- | <pre>
--   let y = f x
--   </pre>
CompLetDecls :: [Decl] -> CompStmt

-- | <tt>then f</tt> (TransformListComp)
CompThen :: Expr -> CompStmt

-- | <tt>then f by e</tt> (TransformListComp)
CompThenBy :: Expr -> Expr -> CompStmt

-- | <tt>then group using f</tt> (TransformListComp)
CompGroupUsing :: Expr -> CompStmt

-- | <tt>then group by e using f</tt> (TransformListComp)
CompGroupByUsing :: Expr -> Expr -> CompStmt

-- | A functional dependency. Example: <tt>a -&gt; b</tt> in <tt>class C a
--   b | a -&gt; b</tt>.
data FunctionalDependency
FunctionalDependency :: [Annotation] -> [Text] -> [Text] -> FunctionalDependency
[functionalDependencyAnns] :: FunctionalDependency -> [Annotation]
[functionalDependencyDeterminers] :: FunctionalDependency -> [Text]
[functionalDependencyDetermined] :: FunctionalDependency -> [Text]

-- | The result signature on a type family head.
data TypeFamilyResultSig

-- | <pre>
--   type family F a :: Type
--   </pre>
TypeFamilyKindSig :: Type -> TypeFamilyResultSig

-- | <pre>
--   type family F a = r
--   </pre>
TypeFamilyTyVarSig :: TyVarBinder -> TypeFamilyResultSig

-- | <pre>
--   type family F a = r | r -&gt; a
--   </pre>
TypeFamilyInjectiveSig :: TyVarBinder -> TypeFamilyInjectivity -> TypeFamilyResultSig

-- | The injectivity annotation in a type family result signature. Example:
--   <tt>r -&gt; a b</tt> in <tt>type family F a b = r | r -&gt; a b</tt>.
data TypeFamilyInjectivity
TypeFamilyInjectivity :: [Annotation] -> Text -> [Text] -> TypeFamilyInjectivity
[typeFamilyInjectivityAnns] :: TypeFamilyInjectivity -> [Annotation]
[typeFamilyInjectivityResult] :: TypeFamilyInjectivity -> Text
[typeFamilyInjectivityDetermined] :: TypeFamilyInjectivity -> [Text]

-- | Whether a type or binder head is prefix or infix. Examples: <tt>T
--   a</tt> versus <tt>a :+: b</tt>.
data TypeHeadForm

-- | <pre>
--   T a
--   </pre>
TypeHeadPrefix :: TypeHeadForm

-- | <pre>
--   a :+: b
--   </pre>
TypeHeadInfix :: TypeHeadForm

-- | A data constructor declaration.
data DataConDecl

-- | Metadata for the whole constructor declaration (typically a
--   <a>SourceSpan</a> via <a>mkAnnotation</a>).
DataConAnn :: Annotation -> DataConDecl -> DataConDecl

-- | <pre>
--   Just a
--   </pre>
PrefixCon :: [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> UnqualifiedName -> [BangType] -> DataConDecl

-- | <pre>
--   a :+: b
--   </pre>
InfixCon :: [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> BangType -> UnqualifiedName -> BangType -> DataConDecl

-- | <pre>
--   MkT { x :: Int, y :: Bool }
--   </pre>
RecordCon :: [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> UnqualifiedName -> [FieldDecl] -> DataConDecl

-- | GADT-style constructor: <tt>Con :: forall a. Ctx =&gt; Type</tt> The
--   list of names supports multiple constructors: <tt>T1, T2 :: Type</tt>
GadtCon :: [ForallTelescope] -> [Type] -> [UnqualifiedName] -> GadtBody -> DataConDecl

-- | Tuple-style constructor: <tt>()</tt>, <tt>(a,b)</tt>, <tt>(# #)</tt>,
--   <tt>(# a,b #)</tt>
TupleCon :: [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> TupleFlavor -> [BangType] -> DataConDecl

-- | Unboxed sum constructor: <tt>(# a | #)</tt>, <tt>(# | b #)</tt>
--   Fields: forall vars, context, position (1-based), total arity, field
--   type
UnboxedSumCon :: [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> Int -> Int -> BangType -> DataConDecl

-- | List constructor: <tt>[]</tt>
ListCon :: [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> DataConDecl

-- | A <tt>data</tt> or <tt>type data</tt> declaration body. Examples:
--   <tt>data Maybe a = Nothing | Just a</tt> and <tt>type data Nat = Z | S
--   Nat</tt>.
data DataDecl
DataDecl :: Maybe Pragma -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName -> [Type] -> Maybe Type -> [DataConDecl] -> [DerivingClause] -> DataDecl
[dataDeclCTypePragma] :: DataDecl -> Maybe Pragma
[dataDeclHead] :: DataDecl -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName
[dataDeclContext] :: DataDecl -> [Type]

-- | Optional inline kind annotation (<tt>:: Kind</tt>) before <tt>=</tt>
--   or <tt>where</tt>
[dataDeclKind] :: DataDecl -> Maybe Type
[dataDeclConstructors] :: DataDecl -> [DataConDecl]
[dataDeclDeriving] :: DataDecl -> [DerivingClause]

-- | A top-level declaration.
data Decl

-- | Metadata for the whole declaration.
DeclAnn :: Annotation -> Decl -> Decl

-- | <tt>f x = x</tt> or <tt>x = 1</tt>
DeclValue :: ValueDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   f, g :: Int -&gt; Int
--   </pre>
DeclTypeSig :: [BinderName] -> Type -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   pattern P x = Just x
--   </pre>
DeclPatSyn :: PatSynDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   pattern P :: a -&gt; Maybe a
--   </pre>
DeclPatSynSig :: [BinderName] -> Type -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   type T :: Type -&gt; Type
--   </pre>
DeclStandaloneKindSig :: BinderName -> Type -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   infixr 5 :+:
--   </pre>
DeclFixity :: FixityAssoc -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Maybe Int -> [OperatorName] -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   type role T nominal representational
--   </pre>
DeclRoleAnnotation :: RoleAnnotation -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   type Pair a = (a, a)
--   </pre>
DeclTypeSyn :: TypeSynDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   type data Nat = Z | S Nat
--   </pre>
DeclTypeData :: DataDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   data Maybe a = Nothing | Just a
--   </pre>
DeclData :: DataDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   newtype Identity a = Identity a
--   </pre>
DeclNewtype :: NewtypeDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   class Functor f where fmap :: (a -&gt; b) -&gt; f a -&gt; f b
--   </pre>
DeclClass :: ClassDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   instance Show a =&gt; Show [a] where ...
--   </pre>
DeclInstance :: InstanceDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   deriving stock instance Show a =&gt; Show (T a)
--   </pre>
DeclStandaloneDeriving :: StandaloneDerivingDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   default (Integer, Double)
--   </pre>
DeclDefault :: [Type] -> Decl

-- | <tt>$decl</tt> or <tt>$(decl)</tt>
DeclSplice :: Expr -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   foreign import ccall "puts" puts :: CString -&gt; IO CInt
--   </pre>
DeclForeign :: ForeignDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   type family F a :: Type
--   </pre>
DeclTypeFamilyDecl :: TypeFamilyDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   data family DF a
--   </pre>
DeclDataFamilyDecl :: DataFamilyDecl -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   type instance F Int = Bool
--   </pre>
DeclTypeFamilyInst :: TypeFamilyInst -> Decl

-- | <pre>
--   data instance DF Int = DFInt
--   </pre>
DeclDataFamilyInst :: DataFamilyInst -> Decl

-- | A standalone pragma declaration such as <tt>{-# INLINE f #-}</tt>.
DeclPragma :: Pragma -> Decl

-- | One <tt>deriving</tt> clause. Examples: <tt>deriving Show</tt> and
--   <tt>deriving stock (Eq, Ord)</tt>.
data DerivingClause
DerivingClause :: Maybe DerivingStrategy -> Either Name [Type] -> DerivingClause
[derivingStrategy] :: DerivingClause -> Maybe DerivingStrategy
[derivingClasses] :: DerivingClause -> Either Name [Type]

-- | An explicit deriving strategy.
data DerivingStrategy

-- | <pre>
--   deriving stock Show
--   </pre>
DerivingStock :: DerivingStrategy

-- | <pre>
--   deriving newtype Num
--   </pre>
DerivingNewtype :: DerivingStrategy

-- | <pre>
--   deriving anyclass C
--   </pre>
DerivingAnyclass :: DerivingStrategy

-- | <pre>
--   deriving via Wrapper T
--   </pre>
DerivingVia :: Type -> DerivingStrategy

-- | The keyword that introduces a <tt>do</tt>-like block. Examples:
--   <tt>do</tt>, <tt>mdo</tt>, <tt>M.do</tt>, and <tt>M.mdo</tt>.
data DoFlavor

-- | <pre>
--   do { stmts }
--   </pre>
DoPlain :: DoFlavor

-- | <pre>
--   mdo { stmts }
--   </pre>
DoMdo :: DoFlavor

-- | <tt>M.do { stmts }</tt> (QualifiedDo)
DoQualified :: Text -> DoFlavor

-- | <tt>M.mdo { stmts }</tt> (QualifiedDo + RecursiveDo)
DoQualifiedMdo :: Text -> DoFlavor

-- | A statement inside a <tt>do</tt> block.
data DoStmt body

-- | Metadata for the whole do-statement (typically a <a>SourceSpan</a> via
--   <a>mkAnnotation</a>).
DoAnn :: Annotation -> DoStmt body -> DoStmt body

-- | <pre>
--   pat &lt;- expr
--   </pre>
DoBind :: Pattern -> body -> DoStmt body

-- | <pre>
--   let decls
--   </pre>
DoLetDecls :: [Decl] -> DoStmt body

-- | A bare expression statement such as <tt>print x</tt>.
DoExpr :: body -> DoStmt body

-- | <pre>
--   rec { stmts }
--   </pre>
DoRecStmt :: [DoStmt body] -> DoStmt body

-- | An expression.
data Expr

-- | Metadata for the whole expression.
EAnn :: Annotation -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <tt>x</tt> or <tt>Data.List.map</tt>
EVar :: Name -> Expr

-- | <tt>type T</tt> in a term position.
ETypeSyntax :: TypeSyntaxForm -> Type -> Expr

-- | <tt>1</tt>, <tt>1#</tt>, <tt>1#Word8</tt>
EInt :: Integer -> NumericType -> Text -> Expr

-- | <tt>1.0</tt>, <tt>1.0#</tt>, <tt>1.0##</tt>
EFloat :: Rational -> FloatType -> Text -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   <tt>x</tt>
--   </pre>
EChar :: Char -> Text -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   <tt>x</tt>#
--   </pre>
ECharHash :: Char -> Text -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   "hello"
--   </pre>
EString :: Text -> Text -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   "hello"#
--   </pre>
EStringHash :: Text -> Text -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   #name
--   </pre>
EOverloadedLabel :: Text -> Text -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [qq| body |]
--   </pre>
EQuasiQuote :: Text -> Text -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   if c then t else e
--   </pre>
EIf :: Expr -> Expr -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   if | g1 -&gt; e1 | g2 -&gt; e2
--   </pre>
EMultiWayIf :: [GuardedRhs Expr] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   x y -&gt; body
--   </pre>
ELambdaPats :: [Pattern] -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   case { p -&gt; e }
--   </pre>
ELambdaCase :: [CaseAlt Expr] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   cases { p q -&gt; e }
--   </pre>
ELambdaCases :: [LambdaCaseAlt] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   a + b
--   </pre>
EInfix :: Expr -> Name -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   -x
--   </pre>
ENegate :: Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   (x +)
--   </pre>
ESectionL :: Expr -> Name -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   (+ x)
--   </pre>
ESectionR :: Name -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   let x = 1 in x
--   </pre>
ELetDecls :: [Decl] -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   case x of { Just y -&gt; y }
--   </pre>
ECase :: Expr -> [CaseAlt Expr] -> Expr

-- | <tt>do { x &lt;- mx; pure x }</tt>, <tt>mdo { ... }</tt>, or <tt>M.do
--   { ... }</tt>
EDo :: [DoStmt Expr] -> DoFlavor -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [x | x <a>xs, x</a> 0]
--   </pre>
EListComp :: Expr -> [CompStmt] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [x + y | x &lt;- xs | y &lt;- ys]
--   </pre>
EListCompParallel :: Expr -> [[CompStmt]] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [1,3 .. 9]
--   </pre>
EArithSeq :: ArithSeq -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   T { x = 1, y, .. }
--   </pre>
ERecordCon :: Name -> [RecordField Expr] -> Bool -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   r { x = 1 }
--   </pre>
ERecordUpd :: Expr -> [RecordField Expr] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   a.b
--   </pre>
EGetField :: Expr -> Name -> Expr

-- | <tt>(.b)</tt> or <tt>(.b.c)</tt>
EGetFieldProjection :: [Name] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   (expr :: ty)
--   </pre>
ETypeSig :: Expr -> Type -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   (expr)
--   </pre>
EParen :: Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [x, y]
--   </pre>
EList :: [Expr] -> Expr

-- | <tt>(x, y)</tt>, <tt>(, y)</tt>, or <tt>(# x | #)</tt>
ETuple :: TupleFlavor -> [Maybe Expr] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   (# | x | #)
--   </pre>
EUnboxedSum :: Int -> Int -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   f @Type
--   </pre>
ETypeApp :: Expr -> Type -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   f x
--   </pre>
EApp :: Expr -> Expr -> Expr

-- | <tt>[| expr |]</tt> or <tt>[e| expr |]</tt>
ETHExpQuote :: Expr -> Expr

-- | <tt>[|| expr ||]</tt> or <tt>[e|| expr ||]</tt>
ETHTypedQuote :: Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [d| decls |]
--   </pre>
ETHDeclQuote :: [Decl] -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [t| type |]
--   </pre>
ETHTypeQuote :: Type -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   [p| pat |]
--   </pre>
ETHPatQuote :: Pattern -> Expr

-- | <tt>'expr</tt> in the term namespace.
ETHNameQuote :: Expr -> Expr

-- | <tt>''Type</tt> in the type namespace.
ETHTypeNameQuote :: Type -> Expr

-- | <tt>$expr</tt> or <tt>$(expr)</tt>
ETHSplice :: Expr -> Expr

-- | <tt>$$expr</tt> or <tt>$$(expr)</tt>
ETHTypedSplice :: Expr -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   proc pat -&gt; cmd
--   </pre>
EProc :: Pattern -> Cmd -> Expr

-- | <pre>
--   {-# SCC foo #-} expr
--   </pre>
EPragma :: Pragma -> Expr -> Expr

-- | A <tt>LANGUAGE</tt> pragma name. Examples: <tt>OverloadedStrings</tt>
--   in <tt>{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}</tt> and <tt>LambdaCase</tt>
--   in <tt>{-# LANGUAGE LambdaCase #-}</tt>.
data Extension
AllowAmbiguousTypes :: Extension
AlternativeLayoutRule :: Extension
AlternativeLayoutRuleTransitional :: Extension
ApplicativeDo :: Extension
Arrows :: Extension
AutoDeriveTypeable :: Extension
BangPatterns :: Extension
BinaryLiterals :: Extension
BlockArguments :: Extension
CApiFFI :: Extension
ConstrainedClassMethods :: Extension
ConstraintKinds :: Extension
CPP :: Extension
CUSKs :: Extension
DataKinds :: Extension
DatatypeContexts :: Extension
DeepSubsumption :: Extension
DefaultSignatures :: Extension
DeriveAnyClass :: Extension
DeriveDataTypeable :: Extension
DeriveFoldable :: Extension
DeriveFunctor :: Extension
DeriveGeneric :: Extension
DeriveLift :: Extension
DeriveTraversable :: Extension
DerivingStrategies :: Extension
DerivingViaExtension :: Extension
DisambiguateRecordFields :: Extension
DoAndIfThenElse :: Extension
DoRec :: Extension
DuplicateRecordFields :: Extension
EmptyCase :: Extension
EmptyDataDecls :: Extension
EmptyDataDeriving :: Extension
ExistentialQuantification :: Extension
ExplicitForAll :: Extension
ExplicitLevelImports :: Extension
ExplicitNamespaces :: Extension
ExtensibleRecords :: Extension
ExtendedDefaultRules :: Extension
ExtendedLiterals :: Extension
FieldSelectors :: Extension
FlexibleContexts :: Extension
FlexibleInstances :: Extension
ForeignFunctionInterface :: Extension
FunctionalDependencies :: Extension
GADTs :: Extension
GADTSyntax :: Extension
Generics :: Extension
GeneralizedNewtypeDeriving :: Extension
GHC2021 :: Extension
GHC2024 :: Extension
GHCForeignImportPrim :: Extension
Haskell2010 :: Extension
Haskell98 :: Extension
HereDocuments :: Extension
HexFloatLiterals :: Extension
ImplicitParams :: Extension
ImplicitPrelude :: Extension
ImplicitStagePersistence :: Extension
ImportQualifiedPost :: Extension
ImpredicativeTypes :: Extension
IncoherentInstances :: Extension
InstanceSigs :: Extension
InterruptibleFFI :: Extension
JavaScriptFFI :: Extension
KindSignatures :: Extension
LambdaCase :: Extension
LexicalNegation :: Extension
LiberalTypeSynonyms :: Extension
LinearTypes :: Extension
ListTuplePuns :: Extension
MagicHash :: Extension
MonadComprehensions :: Extension
MonadFailDesugaring :: Extension
MonoLocalBinds :: Extension
MonoPatBinds :: Extension
MonomorphismRestriction :: Extension
MultilineStrings :: Extension
MultiParamTypeClasses :: Extension
MultiWayIf :: Extension
NamedDefaults :: Extension
NamedFieldPuns :: Extension
NamedWildCards :: Extension
NewQualifiedOperators :: Extension
NegativeLiterals :: Extension
NondecreasingIndentation :: Extension
NPlusKPatterns :: Extension
NullaryTypeClasses :: Extension
NumDecimals :: Extension
NumericUnderscores :: Extension
OrPatterns :: Extension
OverlappingInstances :: Extension
OverloadedLabels :: Extension
OverloadedLists :: Extension
OverloadedRecordDot :: Extension
OverloadedRecordUpdate :: Extension
OverloadedStrings :: Extension
PackageImports :: Extension
ParallelArrays :: Extension
ParallelListComp :: Extension
PartialTypeSignatures :: Extension
PatternSignatures :: Extension
PatternGuards :: Extension
PatternSynonyms :: Extension
PolymorphicComponents :: Extension
PolyKinds :: Extension
PostfixOperators :: Extension
QualifiedDo :: Extension
QualifiedStrings :: Extension
QuantifiedConstraints :: Extension
QuasiQuotes :: Extension
Rank2Types :: Extension
RankNTypes :: Extension
RebindableSyntax :: Extension
RecordPuns :: Extension
RecordWildCards :: Extension
RecursiveDo :: Extension
RegularPatterns :: Extension
RelaxedLayout :: Extension
RelaxedPolyRec :: Extension
RestrictedTypeSynonyms :: Extension
RequiredTypeArguments :: Extension
RoleAnnotations :: Extension
SafeImports :: Extension
SafeHaskell :: Extension
ScopedTypeVariables :: Extension
StandaloneDeriving :: Extension
StandaloneKindSignatures :: Extension
StarIsType :: Extension
StaticPointers :: Extension
Strict :: Extension
StrictData :: Extension
TemplateHaskell :: Extension
TemplateHaskellQuotes :: Extension
TraditionalRecordSyntax :: Extension
TransformListComp :: Extension
Trustworthy :: Extension
TupleSections :: Extension
TypeAbstractions :: Extension
TypeApplications :: Extension
TypeData :: Extension
TypeFamilies :: Extension
TypeFamilyDependencies :: Extension
TypeInType :: Extension
TypeOperators :: Extension
TypeSynonymInstances :: Extension
UnboxedSums :: Extension
UnboxedTuples :: Extension
UndecidableInstances :: Extension
UndecidableSuperClasses :: Extension
UnicodeSyntax :: Extension
UnliftedDatatypes :: Extension
UnliftedFFITypes :: Extension
UnliftedNewtypes :: Extension
UnsafeHaskell :: Extension
ViewPatterns :: Extension
XmlSyntax :: Extension
data ExtensionSet

-- | A single <tt>LANGUAGE</tt> pragma entry. Examples: <tt>EnableExtension
--   LambdaCase</tt> for <tt>{-# LANGUAGE LambdaCase #-}</tt> and
--   <tt>DisableExtension ImplicitPrelude</tt> for <tt>{-# LANGUAGE
--   NoImplicitPrelude #-}</tt>.
data ExtensionSetting

-- | <pre>
--   {-# LANGUAGE LambdaCase #-}
--   </pre>
EnableExtension :: Extension -> ExtensionSetting

-- | <pre>
--   {-# LANGUAGE NoImplicitPrelude #-}
--   </pre>
DisableExtension :: Extension -> ExtensionSetting

-- | One item in a module export list.
data ExportSpec

-- | <pre>
--   module Data.List
--   </pre>
ExportModule :: Maybe Pragma -> Text -> ExportSpec

-- | <tt>map</tt> or <tt>type T</tt>
ExportVar :: Maybe Pragma -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Name -> ExportSpec

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe
--   </pre>
ExportAbs :: Maybe Pragma -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Name -> ExportSpec

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe(..)
--   </pre>
ExportAll :: Maybe Pragma -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Name -> ExportSpec

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe(Just, Nothing)
--   </pre>
ExportWith :: Maybe Pragma -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Name -> [IEBundledMember] -> ExportSpec

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe(Just, .., Nothing)
--   </pre>
ExportWithAll :: Maybe Pragma -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Name -> Int -> [IEBundledMember] -> ExportSpec

-- | Metadata for the whole export item.
ExportAnn :: Annotation -> ExportSpec -> ExportSpec

-- | Optional namespace qualifiers on import or export items. Examples:
--   <tt>type T</tt>, <tt>pattern P</tt>, <tt>data T</tt>.
data IEEntityNamespace

-- | <pre>
--   type T
--   </pre>
IEEntityNamespaceType :: IEEntityNamespace

-- | <pre>
--   pattern P
--   </pre>
IEEntityNamespacePattern :: IEEntityNamespace

-- | <pre>
--   data T
--   </pre>
IEEntityNamespaceData :: IEEntityNamespace

-- | Namespace qualifiers for bundled members in import and export lists.
--   Examples: <tt>T(type (+))</tt> and <tt>T(data MkT)</tt>.
data IEBundledNamespace

-- | <pre>
--   T(type (+))
--   </pre>
IEBundledNamespaceType :: IEBundledNamespace

-- | <pre>
--   T(data MkT)
--   </pre>
IEBundledNamespaceData :: IEBundledNamespace

-- | A member bundled with a parent import or export. Example:
--   <tt>Just</tt> in <tt>Maybe(Just, Nothing)</tt>.
data IEBundledMember
IEBundledMember :: Maybe IEBundledNamespace -> Name -> IEBundledMember
[ieBundledMemberNamespace] :: IEBundledMember -> Maybe IEBundledNamespace
[ieBundledMemberName] :: IEBundledMember -> Name

-- | A record field declaration. Example: <tt>x, y :: Int</tt> in <tt>data
--   T = MkT { x, y :: Int }</tt>.
data FieldDecl
FieldDecl :: [Annotation] -> [UnqualifiedName] -> Maybe Type -> BangType -> FieldDecl
[fieldAnns] :: FieldDecl -> [Annotation]
[fieldNames] :: FieldDecl -> [UnqualifiedName]

-- | Optional multiplicity annotation, e.g. <tt>x %'Many :: a</tt>.
[fieldMultiplicity] :: FieldDecl -> Maybe Type
[fieldType] :: FieldDecl -> BangType

-- | Fixity associativity declarations. Examples: <tt>infix</tt>,
--   <tt>infixl</tt>, and <tt>infixr</tt>.
data FixityAssoc

-- | <pre>
--   infix
--   </pre>
Infix :: FixityAssoc

-- | <pre>
--   infixl
--   </pre>
InfixL :: FixityAssoc

-- | <pre>
--   infixr
--   </pre>
InfixR :: FixityAssoc

-- | A foreign import or export declaration. Example: <tt>foreign import
--   ccall "puts" puts :: CString -&gt; IO CInt</tt>.
data ForeignDecl
ForeignDecl :: ForeignDirection -> CallConv -> Maybe ForeignSafety -> ForeignEntitySpec -> UnqualifiedName -> Type -> ForeignDecl
[foreignDirection] :: ForeignDecl -> ForeignDirection
[foreignCallConv] :: ForeignDecl -> CallConv
[foreignSafety] :: ForeignDecl -> Maybe ForeignSafety
[foreignEntity] :: ForeignDecl -> ForeignEntitySpec
[foreignName] :: ForeignDecl -> UnqualifiedName
[foreignType] :: ForeignDecl -> Type

-- | Whether a foreign declaration imports or exports a symbol. Examples:
--   <tt>foreign import</tt> and <tt>foreign export</tt>.
data ForeignDirection

-- | <pre>
--   foreign import ...
--   </pre>
ForeignImport :: ForeignDirection

-- | <pre>
--   foreign export ...
--   </pre>
ForeignExport :: ForeignDirection

-- | The entity part of a foreign declaration.
data ForeignEntitySpec

-- | <pre>
--   foreign import ccall "dynamic" ...
--   </pre>
ForeignEntityDynamic :: ForeignEntitySpec

-- | <pre>
--   foreign import ccall "wrapper" ...
--   </pre>
ForeignEntityWrapper :: ForeignEntitySpec

-- | <pre>
--   foreign import ccall "static foo" ...
--   </pre>
ForeignEntityStatic :: Maybe Text -> ForeignEntitySpec

-- | <pre>
--   foreign import ccall "&amp;foo" ...
--   </pre>
ForeignEntityAddress :: Maybe Text -> ForeignEntitySpec

-- | <pre>
--   foreign import ccall "foo" ...
--   </pre>
ForeignEntityNamed :: Text -> ForeignEntitySpec

-- | No explicit entity string, as in <tt>foreign import ccall foo ::
--   ...</tt>.
ForeignEntityOmitted :: ForeignEntitySpec

-- | Optional foreign-call safety annotations. Examples: <tt>safe</tt>,
--   <tt>unsafe</tt>, and <tt>interruptible</tt>.
data ForeignSafety

-- | <pre>
--   safe
--   </pre>
Safe :: ForeignSafety

-- | <pre>
--   unsafe
--   </pre>
Unsafe :: ForeignSafety

-- | <pre>
--   interruptible
--   </pre>
Interruptible :: ForeignSafety

-- | Body of a GADT constructor after the <tt>::</tt> and optional
--   forall/context Examples: <tt>MkT :: a -&gt; T a</tt> and <tt>MkT :: {
--   field :: a } -&gt; T a</tt>.
data GadtBody

-- | Prefix body: each argument is paired with its outgoing arrow kind.
--   E.g. <tt>a -&gt; b %1 -&gt; T a</tt> gives <tt>[(a,
--   ArrowUnrestricted), (b, ArrowLinear)]</tt> with result <tt>T a</tt>.
GadtPrefixBody :: [(BangType, ArrowKind)] -> Type -> GadtBody

-- | Record body: <tt>{ field :: Type } -&gt; T a</tt>
GadtRecordBody :: [FieldDecl] -> Type -> GadtBody

-- | A single qualifier inside a guarded right-hand side.
data GuardQualifier

-- | Metadata for the whole guard qualifier (typically a <a>SourceSpan</a>
--   via <a>mkAnnotation</a>).
GuardAnn :: Annotation -> GuardQualifier -> GuardQualifier

-- | <pre>
--   x &gt; 0
--   </pre>
GuardExpr :: Expr -> GuardQualifier

-- | <pre>
--   Just y &lt;- mx
--   </pre>
GuardPat :: Pattern -> Expr -> GuardQualifier

-- | <pre>
--   let y = f x
--   </pre>
GuardLet :: [Decl] -> GuardQualifier

-- | One guarded branch. Example: <tt>| x &gt; 0 = x</tt>.
data GuardedRhs body
GuardedRhs :: [Annotation] -> [GuardQualifier] -> body -> GuardedRhs body
[guardedRhsAnns] :: GuardedRhs body -> [Annotation]
[guardedRhsGuards] :: GuardedRhs body -> [GuardQualifier]
[guardedRhsBody] :: GuardedRhs body -> body

-- | A module import declaration. Example: <tt>import qualified Data.Map as
--   Map hiding (lookup)</tt>.
data ImportDecl
ImportDecl :: [Annotation] -> Maybe ImportLevel -> Maybe Text -> Maybe Pragma -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool -> Text -> Maybe Text -> Maybe ImportSpec -> ImportDecl
[importDeclAnns] :: ImportDecl -> [Annotation]
[importDeclLevel] :: ImportDecl -> Maybe ImportLevel
[importDeclPackage] :: ImportDecl -> Maybe Text
[importDeclSourcePragma] :: ImportDecl -> Maybe Pragma
[importDeclSafe] :: ImportDecl -> Bool
[importDeclQualified] :: ImportDecl -> Bool
[importDeclQualifiedPost] :: ImportDecl -> Bool
[importDeclModule] :: ImportDecl -> Text
[importDeclAs] :: ImportDecl -> Maybe Text
[importDeclSpec] :: ImportDecl -> Maybe ImportSpec

-- | Explicit level imports. Examples: <tt>import quote M</tt> and
--   <tt>import splice M</tt>.
data ImportLevel

-- | <pre>
--   import quote M
--   </pre>
ImportLevelQuote :: ImportLevel

-- | <pre>
--   import splice M
--   </pre>
ImportLevelSplice :: ImportLevel

-- | One item in an import list.
data ImportItem

-- | <tt>map</tt> or <tt>type T</tt>
ImportItemVar :: Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> UnqualifiedName -> ImportItem

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe
--   </pre>
ImportItemAbs :: Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> UnqualifiedName -> ImportItem

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe(..)
--   </pre>
ImportItemAll :: Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> UnqualifiedName -> ImportItem

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe(Just, Nothing)
--   </pre>
ImportItemWith :: Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> UnqualifiedName -> [IEBundledMember] -> ImportItem

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe(Just, .., Nothing)
--   </pre>
ImportItemAllWith :: Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> UnqualifiedName -> Int -> [IEBundledMember] -> ImportItem

-- | Metadata for the whole import item.
ImportAnn :: Annotation -> ImportItem -> ImportItem

-- | An optional import list or hiding list. Examples: <tt>(map,
--   foldr)</tt> and <tt>hiding (map)</tt>.
data ImportSpec
ImportSpec :: [Annotation] -> Bool -> [ImportItem] -> ImportSpec
[importSpecAnns] :: ImportSpec -> [Annotation]
[importSpecHiding] :: ImportSpec -> Bool
[importSpecItems] :: ImportSpec -> [ImportItem]

-- | An instance declaration. Example: <tt>instance Show a =&gt; Show [a]
--   where show = ...</tt>.
data InstanceDecl
InstanceDecl :: [Pragma] -> Maybe Pragma -> [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> InstanceHeadType -> [InstanceDeclItem] -> InstanceDecl
[instanceDeclPragmas] :: InstanceDecl -> [Pragma]
[instanceDeclWarning] :: InstanceDecl -> Maybe Pragma
[instanceDeclForall] :: InstanceDecl -> [TyVarBinder]
[instanceDeclContext] :: InstanceDecl -> [Type]
[instanceDeclHead] :: InstanceDecl -> InstanceHeadType
[instanceDeclItems] :: InstanceDecl -> [InstanceDeclItem]

-- | An item inside an instance body.
data InstanceDeclItem

-- | Metadata for the whole instance item (typically a <a>SourceSpan</a>
--   via <a>mkAnnotation</a>).
InstanceItemAnn :: Annotation -> InstanceDeclItem -> InstanceDeclItem

-- | A method body such as <tt>show x = ...</tt>
InstanceItemBind :: ValueDecl -> InstanceDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   show :: T -&gt; String
--   </pre>
InstanceItemTypeSig :: [BinderName] -> Type -> InstanceDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   infixr 5 :+:
--   </pre>
InstanceItemFixity :: FixityAssoc -> Maybe IEEntityNamespace -> Maybe Int -> [OperatorName] -> InstanceDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   type F Int = Bool
--   </pre>
InstanceItemTypeFamilyInst :: TypeFamilyInst -> InstanceDeclItem

-- | <pre>
--   data instance DF Int = DFInt
--   </pre>
InstanceItemDataFamilyInst :: DataFamilyInst -> InstanceDeclItem
InstanceItemPragma :: Pragma -> InstanceDeclItem

-- | The pragma controlling instance overlap. Examples: <tt>{-# OVERLAPPING
--   #-}</tt> and <tt>{-# INCOHERENT #-}</tt>.
data InstanceOverlapPragma

-- | <pre>
--   {-# OVERLAPPING #-}
--   </pre>
Overlapping :: InstanceOverlapPragma

-- | <pre>
--   {-# OVERLAPPABLE #-}
--   </pre>
Overlappable :: InstanceOverlapPragma

-- | <pre>
--   {-# OVERLAPS #-}
--   </pre>
Overlaps :: InstanceOverlapPragma

-- | <pre>
--   {-# INCOHERENT #-}
--   </pre>
Incoherent :: InstanceOverlapPragma

-- | The Haskell language edition/standard. Each edition implies a set of
--   language extensions. Examples: <tt>{-# LANGUAGE Haskell2010 #-}</tt>
--   and <tt>{-# LANGUAGE GHC2021 #-}</tt>.
data LanguageEdition
Haskell98Edition :: LanguageEdition
Haskell2010Edition :: LanguageEdition
GHC2021Edition :: LanguageEdition
GHC2024Edition :: LanguageEdition

-- | One multi-argument <tt>cases</tt> alternative. Example: <tt>Just x y
--   -&gt; x + y</tt>.
data LambdaCaseAlt
LambdaCaseAlt :: [Annotation] -> [Pattern] -> Rhs Expr -> LambdaCaseAlt
[lambdaCaseAltAnns] :: LambdaCaseAlt -> [Annotation]
[lambdaCaseAltPats] :: LambdaCaseAlt -> [Pattern]
[lambdaCaseAltRhs] :: LambdaCaseAlt -> Rhs Expr

-- | A literal token.
data Literal

-- | Metadata for the whole literal.
LitAnn :: Annotation -> Literal -> Literal

-- | <tt>1</tt>, <tt>1#</tt>, <tt>1#Word8</tt>
LitInt :: Integer -> NumericType -> Text -> Literal

-- | <tt>1.0</tt>, <tt>1.0#</tt>, <tt>1.0##</tt>
LitFloat :: Rational -> FloatType -> Text -> Literal

-- | <pre>
--   <tt>x</tt>
--   </pre>
LitChar :: Char -> Text -> Literal

-- | <pre>
--   <tt>x</tt>#
--   </pre>
LitCharHash :: Char -> Text -> Literal

-- | <pre>
--   "hello"
--   </pre>
LitString :: Text -> Text -> Literal

-- | <pre>
--   "hello"#
--   </pre>
LitStringHash :: Text -> Text -> Literal

-- | One equation of a function or pattern synonym. Examples: <tt>f x =
--   x</tt> and <tt>x :+: y = z</tt>.
data Match
Match :: [Annotation] -> MatchHeadForm -> [Pattern] -> Rhs Expr -> Match
[matchAnns] :: Match -> [Annotation]
[matchHeadForm] :: Match -> MatchHeadForm
[matchPats] :: Match -> [Pattern]
[matchRhs] :: Match -> Rhs Expr

-- | Whether a binding head is prefix or infix. Examples: <tt>f x</tt> and
--   <tt>x :+: y</tt>.
data MatchHeadForm

-- | <pre>
--   f x
--   </pre>
MatchHeadPrefix :: MatchHeadForm

-- | <pre>
--   x :+: y
--   </pre>
MatchHeadInfix :: MatchHeadForm

-- | Multiplicity tag on a let/where pattern binding. Corresponds to <tt>x
--   = e</tt> (no tag), <tt>%1 x = e</tt> (linear), <tt>%m x = e</tt>
--   (explicit).
data MultiplicityTag

-- | <pre>
--   x = e
--   </pre>
NoMultiplicityTag :: MultiplicityTag

-- | <pre>
--   %1 x = e
--   </pre>
LinearMultiplicityTag :: MultiplicityTag

-- | <pre>
--   %m x = e
--   </pre>
ExplicitMultiplicityTag :: Type -> MultiplicityTag

-- | A whole Haskell module. Example: <tt>module M (x) where import
--   Data.List; x = 1</tt>.
data Module
Module :: [Annotation] -> Maybe ModuleHead -> [ExtensionSetting] -> [ImportDecl] -> [Decl] -> Module
[moduleAnns] :: Module -> [Annotation]
[moduleHead] :: Module -> Maybe ModuleHead
[moduleLanguagePragmas] :: Module -> [ExtensionSetting]
[moduleImports] :: Module -> [ImportDecl]
[moduleDecls] :: Module -> [Decl]

-- | The optional <tt>module ... where</tt> header. Example: <tt>module M
--   (x, type T) where</tt>.
data ModuleHead
ModuleHead :: [Annotation] -> Text -> Maybe Pragma -> Maybe [ExportSpec] -> ModuleHead
[moduleHeadAnns] :: ModuleHead -> [Annotation]
[moduleHeadName] :: ModuleHead -> Text
[moduleHeadWarningPragma] :: ModuleHead -> Maybe Pragma
[moduleHeadExports] :: ModuleHead -> Maybe [ExportSpec]

-- | Pragmas extracted from a module header. Contains the last language
--   edition pragma (if any) and all extension settings. Example: <tt>{-#
--   LANGUAGE Haskell2010, LambdaCase, NoImplicitPrelude #-}</tt>.
data ModuleHeaderPragmas
ModuleHeaderPragmas :: Maybe LanguageEdition -> [ExtensionSetting] -> ModuleHeaderPragmas
[headerLanguageEdition] :: ModuleHeaderPragmas -> Maybe LanguageEdition
[headerExtensionSettings] :: ModuleHeaderPragmas -> [ExtensionSetting]

-- | A qualified or unqualified name with type information.
--   
--   The <a>nameQualifier</a> is the module path (e.g., "Data.List"), and
--   <a>nameText</a> is the local name (e.g., "map"). For unqualified
--   names, <a>nameQualifier</a> is <a>Nothing</a>. Example:
--   <tt>Data.List.map</tt>.
data Name
Name :: Maybe Text -> NameType -> Text -> [Annotation] -> Name

-- | Module qualifier (e.g., <tt>"Data.List"</tt> for
--   <tt>Data.List.map</tt>)
[nameQualifier] :: Name -> Maybe Text

-- | Whether this is a variable, constructor, or operator
[nameType] :: Name -> NameType

-- | The local name (e.g., <tt>"map"</tt>, <tt>".+."</tt>)
[nameText] :: Name -> Text

-- | Metadata attached to this name occurrence.
[nameAnns] :: Name -> [Annotation]

-- | The syntactic category of a name.
data NameType

-- | Variable identifier (e.g., <tt>x</tt>, <tt>map</tt>, <tt>id</tt>)
NameVarId :: NameType

-- | Constructor identifier (e.g., <tt>Just</tt>, <tt>Maybe</tt>)
NameConId :: NameType

-- | Variable operator (e.g., <tt>+</tt>, <tt>.&amp;.</tt>)
NameVarSym :: NameType

-- | Constructor operator (e.g., <tt>:</tt>, <tt>:++</tt>)
NameConSym :: NameType

-- | An unqualified identifier or operator. Examples: <tt>map</tt>,
--   <tt>Just</tt>, <tt>:+:</tt>.
data UnqualifiedName
UnqualifiedName :: NameType -> Text -> [Annotation] -> UnqualifiedName
[unqualifiedNameType] :: UnqualifiedName -> NameType
[unqualifiedNameText] :: UnqualifiedName -> Text
[unqualifiedNameAnns] :: UnqualifiedName -> [Annotation]

-- | Instance heads are stored as ordinary types. Parenthesisation is
--   captured naturally via <a>TParen</a> nodes, so a separate <a>Bool</a>
--   flag is unnecessary. The class name and type arguments can be
--   extracted from the spine when needed (see <a>instanceHeadName</a>,
--   <a>instanceHeadTypes</a>).
type InstanceHeadType = Type

-- | Opaque metadata attached to syntax nodes.
--   
--   Parsed syntax overwhelmingly attaches <a>SourceSpan</a> annotations,
--   so spans get a direct representation. Later compiler stages can still
--   attach arbitrary typed metadata through the dynamic fallback.
data Annotation

-- | A <tt>newtype</tt> declaration. Example: <tt>newtype Identity a =
--   Identity a</tt>.
data NewtypeDecl
NewtypeDecl :: Maybe Pragma -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName -> [Type] -> Maybe Type -> Maybe DataConDecl -> [DerivingClause] -> NewtypeDecl
[newtypeDeclCTypePragma] :: NewtypeDecl -> Maybe Pragma
[newtypeDeclHead] :: NewtypeDecl -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName
[newtypeDeclContext] :: NewtypeDecl -> [Type]

-- | Optional inline kind annotation (<tt>:: Kind</tt>) before <tt>=</tt>
--   or <tt>where</tt>
[newtypeDeclKind] :: NewtypeDecl -> Maybe Type
[newtypeDeclConstructor] :: NewtypeDecl -> Maybe DataConDecl
[newtypeDeclDeriving] :: NewtypeDecl -> [DerivingClause]
type OperatorName = UnqualifiedName

-- | Pattern synonym argument form.
data PatSynArgs

-- | <pre>
--   pattern Name arg1 arg2 ...
--   </pre>
PatSynPrefixArgs :: [Text] -> PatSynArgs

-- | <tt>pattern arg1 `Name` arg2</tt> or <tt>pattern arg1 :+: arg2</tt>
PatSynInfixArgs :: Text -> Text -> PatSynArgs

-- | <pre>
--   pattern Name {field1, field2}
--   </pre>
PatSynRecordArgs :: [Text] -> PatSynArgs

-- | Pattern synonym declaration. Example: <tt>pattern JustOne x = Just
--   [x]</tt>.
data PatSynDecl
PatSynDecl :: UnqualifiedName -> PatSynArgs -> Pattern -> PatSynDir -> PatSynDecl
[patSynDeclName] :: PatSynDecl -> UnqualifiedName
[patSynDeclArgs] :: PatSynDecl -> PatSynArgs
[patSynDeclPat] :: PatSynDecl -> Pattern
[patSynDeclDir] :: PatSynDecl -> PatSynDir

-- | Pattern synonym declaration direction.
data PatSynDir

-- | <pre>
--   pattern P x &lt;- pat
--   </pre>
PatSynUnidirectional :: PatSynDir

-- | <pre>
--   pattern P x = pat
--   </pre>
PatSynBidirectional :: PatSynDir

-- | <pre>
--   pattern P x &lt;- pat where P x = expr
--   </pre>
PatSynExplicitBidirectional :: [Match] -> PatSynDir

-- | A pattern.
data Pattern

-- | Metadata for the whole pattern.
PAnn :: Annotation -> Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   x
--   </pre>
PVar :: UnqualifiedName -> Pattern

-- | <tt>@a</tt> in a required type argument pattern.
PTypeBinder :: TyVarBinder -> Pattern

-- | <tt>type T</tt> in a term-level pattern position.
PTypeSyntax :: TypeSyntaxForm -> Type -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   _
--   </pre>
PWildcard :: Pattern

-- | <tt>1</tt> or <tt><tt>x</tt></tt>
PLit :: Literal -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   [p| body |]
--   </pre>
PQuasiQuote :: Text -> Text -> Pattern

-- | <tt>(p1, p2)</tt> or <tt>(# p1, p2 #)</tt>
PTuple :: TupleFlavor -> [Pattern] -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   (# | p | #)
--   </pre>
PUnboxedSum :: Int -> Int -> Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   [p1, p2]
--   </pre>
PList :: [Pattern] -> Pattern

-- | <tt>Just x</tt> or <tt>Proxy @Type</tt>
PCon :: Name -> [Type] -> [Pattern] -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   x :+: y
--   </pre>
PInfix :: Pattern -> Name -> Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   (view -&gt; pat)
--   </pre>
PView :: Expr -> Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   name@pat
--   </pre>
PAs :: UnqualifiedName -> Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   !pat
--   </pre>
PStrict :: Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   ~pat
--   </pre>
PIrrefutable :: Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   -1
--   </pre>
PNegLit :: Literal -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   (pat)
--   </pre>
PParen :: Pattern -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   T { x = p, y, .. }
--   </pre>
PRecord :: Name -> [RecordField Pattern] -> Bool -> Pattern

-- | <pre>
--   (pat :: ty)
--   </pre>
PTypeSig :: Pattern -> Type -> Pattern

-- | <tt>$pat</tt> or <tt>$(pat)</tt>
PSplice :: Expr -> Pattern

-- | One record field occurrence. Examples: <tt>x = 1</tt> in <tt>T { x = 1
--   }</tt> and <tt>x</tt> in <tt>T { x }</tt>.
data RecordField a
RecordField :: Name -> a -> Bool -> RecordField a
[recordFieldName] :: RecordField a -> Name
[recordFieldValue] :: RecordField a -> a
[recordFieldPun] :: RecordField a -> Bool

-- | A full pragma, including its original source text. Example: <tt>{-#
--   INLINE map #-}</tt>.
data Pragma
Pragma :: PragmaType -> Text -> Pragma
[pragmaType] :: Pragma -> PragmaType
[pragmaRawText] :: Pragma -> Text

-- | Parsed pragma payload. Examples include <tt>{-# LANGUAGE LambdaCase
--   #-}</tt>, <tt>{-# WARNING "use g" #-}</tt>, <tt>{-# INLINE [1] f
--   #-}</tt>, and <tt>{-# SCC loop #-}</tt>.
data PragmaType

-- | <pre>
--   {-# LANGUAGE LambdaCase, NoImplicitPrelude #-}
--   </pre>
PragmaLanguage :: [ExtensionSetting] -> PragmaType

-- | <tt>{-# OVERLAPPING #-}</tt> on an instance declaration.
PragmaInstanceOverlap :: InstanceOverlapPragma -> PragmaType

-- | <pre>
--   {-# WARNING "use g" #-}
--   </pre>
PragmaWarning :: Text -> PragmaType

-- | <pre>
--   {-# DEPRECATED "use g" #-}
--   </pre>
PragmaDeprecated :: Text -> PragmaType

-- | <tt>{-# INLINE [1] f #-}</tt> or <tt>{-# NOINLINE f #-}</tt>.
PragmaInline :: Text -> Text -> PragmaType

-- | <tt>{-# UNPACK #-}</tt> or <tt>{-# NOUNPACK #-}</tt>.
PragmaUnpack :: PragmaUnpackKind -> PragmaType

-- | <tt>{-# SOURCE #-}</tt> or <tt>{-# SOURCE "phase" #-}</tt>.
PragmaSource :: Text -> Text -> PragmaType

-- | <pre>
--   {-# SCC loop #-}
--   </pre>
PragmaSCC :: Text -> PragmaType

-- | Any pragma preserved as raw text but not otherwise classified.
PragmaUnknown :: Text -> PragmaType

-- | Strictness field pragmas. Examples: <tt>{-# UNPACK #-}</tt> and
--   <tt>{-# NOUNPACK #-}</tt>.
data PragmaUnpackKind

-- | <pre>
--   {-# UNPACK #-}
--   </pre>
UnpackPragma :: PragmaUnpackKind

-- | <pre>
--   {-# NOUNPACK #-}
--   </pre>
NoUnpackPragma :: PragmaUnpackKind

-- | Roles used in <tt>type role</tt> annotations. Examples:
--   <tt>nominal</tt>, <tt>representational</tt>, <tt>phantom</tt>, and
--   <tt>_</tt>.
data Role

-- | <pre>
--   nominal
--   </pre>
RoleNominal :: Role

-- | <pre>
--   representational
--   </pre>
RoleRepresentational :: Role

-- | <pre>
--   phantom
--   </pre>
RolePhantom :: Role

-- | <pre>
--   _
--   </pre>
RoleInfer :: Role

-- | A <tt>type role</tt> declaration. Example: <tt>type role T nominal
--   representational</tt>.
data RoleAnnotation
RoleAnnotation :: UnqualifiedName -> [Role] -> RoleAnnotation
[roleAnnotationName] :: RoleAnnotation -> UnqualifiedName
[roleAnnotationRoles] :: RoleAnnotation -> [Role]

-- | The right-hand side of a binding, case alternative, or lambda case.
data Rhs body

-- | <tt>= body</tt> with an optional <tt>where</tt> clause.
UnguardedRhs :: [Annotation] -> body -> Maybe [Decl] -> Rhs body

-- | Guarded equations such as <tt>| x &gt; 0 = body</tt>.
GuardedRhss :: [Annotation] -> [GuardedRhs body] -> Maybe [Decl] -> Rhs body

-- | Source location metadata for parsed syntax. Example: the span covering
--   <tt>map</tt> in <tt>map f xs</tt>.
data SourceSpan

-- | No location information is available.
NoSourceSpan :: SourceSpan

-- | A concrete span such as the token range for <tt>map</tt> in <tt>map f
--   xs</tt>.
SourceSpan :: !FilePath -> !Int -> !Int -> !Int -> !Int -> !Int -> !Int -> SourceSpan
[sourceSpanSourceName] :: SourceSpan -> !FilePath
[sourceSpanStartLine] :: SourceSpan -> !Int
[sourceSpanStartCol] :: SourceSpan -> !Int
[sourceSpanEndLine] :: SourceSpan -> !Int
[sourceSpanEndCol] :: SourceSpan -> !Int
[sourceSpanStartOffset] :: SourceSpan -> !Int
[sourceSpanEndOffset] :: SourceSpan -> !Int

-- | A standalone deriving declaration. Example: <tt>deriving stock
--   instance Show a =&gt; Show (T a)</tt>.
data StandaloneDerivingDecl
StandaloneDerivingDecl :: Maybe DerivingStrategy -> [Pragma] -> Maybe Pragma -> [TyVarBinder] -> [Type] -> InstanceHeadType -> StandaloneDerivingDecl
[standaloneDerivingStrategy] :: StandaloneDerivingDecl -> Maybe DerivingStrategy
[standaloneDerivingPragmas] :: StandaloneDerivingDecl -> [Pragma]
[standaloneDerivingWarning] :: StandaloneDerivingDecl -> Maybe Pragma
[standaloneDerivingForall] :: StandaloneDerivingDecl -> [TyVarBinder]
[standaloneDerivingContext] :: StandaloneDerivingDecl -> [Type]
[standaloneDerivingHead] :: StandaloneDerivingDecl -> InstanceHeadType

-- | A type.
data Type

-- | Metadata for the whole type.
TAnn :: Annotation -> Type -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   a
--   </pre>
TVar :: UnqualifiedName -> Type

-- | <tt>Maybe</tt> or <tt>'Just</tt>
TCon :: Name -> TypePromotion -> Type

-- | <tt>(,)</tt>, <tt>(-&gt;)</tt>, <tt>[]</tt>, or <tt>(:)</tt>
TBuiltinCon :: TypeBuiltinCon -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   (?x :: Int) =&gt; Int
--   </pre>
TImplicitParam :: Text -> Type -> Type

-- | <tt>1</tt>, <tt>"x"</tt>, or <tt><tt>c</tt></tt> at the type level.
TTypeLit :: TypeLiteral -> Type

-- | <tt>*</tt> as written source syntax.
TStar :: Text -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   [t| body |]
--   </pre>
TQuasiQuote :: Text -> Text -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   forall a. ty
--   </pre>
TForall :: ForallTelescope -> Type -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   Maybe a
--   </pre>
TApp :: Type -> Type -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   Proxy @Type
--   </pre>
TTypeApp :: Type -> Type -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   a :+: b
--   </pre>
TInfix :: Type -> Name -> TypePromotion -> Type -> Type

-- | <tt>a -&gt; b</tt>, <tt>a %1 -&gt; b</tt>, or <tt>a %m -&gt; b</tt>
TFun :: ArrowKind -> Type -> Type -> Type

-- | <tt>(a, b)</tt>, <tt>'(a, b)</tt>, or <tt>(# a, b #)</tt>
TTuple :: TupleFlavor -> TypePromotion -> [Type] -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   (# a | b #)
--   </pre>
TUnboxedSum :: [Type] -> Type

-- | <tt>[a]</tt> or <tt>'[a, b]</tt>
TList :: TypePromotion -> [Type] -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   (ty)
--   </pre>
TParen :: Type -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   (a :: Type)
--   </pre>
TKindSig :: Type -> Type -> Type

-- | <pre>
--   (Show a, Eq a) =&gt; a -&gt; String
--   </pre>
TContext :: [Type] -> Type -> Type

-- | <tt>$typ</tt> or <tt>$(typ)</tt>
TSplice :: Expr -> Type
TWildcard :: Type

-- | Whether tuple syntax is boxed or unboxed. Examples: <tt>(a, b)</tt>
--   and <tt>(# a, b #)</tt>.
data TupleFlavor

-- | <pre>
--   (a, b)
--   </pre>
Boxed :: TupleFlavor

-- | <pre>
--   (# a, b #)
--   </pre>
Unboxed :: TupleFlavor

-- | How type syntax appears in a term or pattern position. Examples:
--   <tt>type T</tt> and <tt>f (type T)</tt>.
data TypeSyntaxForm

-- | The explicit <tt>type</tt> namespace, as in <tt>type T</tt>.
TypeSyntaxExplicitNamespace :: TypeSyntaxForm

-- | Type syntax embedded in term syntax, as in <tt>f (type T)</tt>.
TypeSyntaxInTerm :: TypeSyntaxForm

-- | Float type suffix for fractional literals. Examples: <tt>1.0</tt>,
--   <tt>1.0#</tt>, <tt>1.0##</tt>.
data FloatType
TFractional :: FloatType
TFloatHash :: FloatType
TDoubleHash :: FloatType

-- | Numeric type suffix for integer literals. Corresponds to the
--   ExtendedLiterals extension (GHC 9.8+). Examples: <tt>1</tt> -&gt;
--   TInteger, <tt>1#</tt> -&gt; TIntHash, <tt>1#Word8</tt> -&gt;
--   TWord8Hash
data NumericType
TInteger :: NumericType
TIntHash :: NumericType
TWordHash :: NumericType
TInt8Hash :: NumericType
TInt16Hash :: NumericType
TInt32Hash :: NumericType
TInt64Hash :: NumericType
TWord8Hash :: NumericType
TWord16Hash :: NumericType
TWord32Hash :: NumericType
TWord64Hash :: NumericType

-- | A type-level literal. Examples: <tt>1</tt>, <tt>"name"</tt>, and
--   <tt><tt>x</tt></tt> in types.
data TypeLiteral

-- | <pre>
--   1
--   </pre>
TypeLitInteger :: Integer -> Text -> TypeLiteral

-- | <pre>
--   "name"
--   </pre>
TypeLitSymbol :: Text -> Text -> TypeLiteral

-- | <pre>
--   <tt>x</tt>
--   </pre>
TypeLitChar :: Char -> Text -> TypeLiteral

-- | Built-in type constructors that have dedicated surface syntax.
--   Examples: <tt>(,)</tt>, <tt>(-&gt;)</tt>, <tt>[]</tt>, and
--   <tt>(:)</tt>.
data TypeBuiltinCon

-- | An <tt>n</tt>-tuple constructor like <tt>(,)</tt> or <tt>(,,)</tt>.
TBuiltinTuple :: Int -> TypeBuiltinCon

-- | <pre>
--   (-&gt;)
--   </pre>
TBuiltinArrow :: TypeBuiltinCon

-- | <pre>
--   []
--   </pre>
TBuiltinList :: TypeBuiltinCon

-- | <pre>
--   (:)
--   </pre>
TBuiltinCons :: TypeBuiltinCon

-- | Whether list, tuple, and constructor syntax is promoted with a leading
--   quote. Examples: <tt>Maybe</tt> versus <tt>'Just</tt>, <tt>[a]</tt>
--   versus <tt>'[a]</tt>.
data TypePromotion

-- | Ordinary type syntax such as <tt>Maybe</tt> or <tt>[a]</tt>.
Unpromoted :: TypePromotion

-- | Promoted syntax such as <tt>'Just</tt> or <tt>'[a]</tt>.
Promoted :: TypePromotion

-- | Whether a <tt>forall</tt> telescope is invisible or visible. Examples:
--   <tt>forall a. ...</tt> and <tt>forall a -&gt; ...</tt>.
data ForallVis

-- | <pre>
--   forall a. ...
--   </pre>
ForallInvisible :: ForallVis

-- | <pre>
--   forall a -&gt; ...
--   </pre>
ForallVisible :: ForallVis

-- | The binders introduced by a <tt>forall</tt>. Example: <tt>forall a b.
--   a -&gt; b -&gt; a</tt>.
data ForallTelescope
ForallTelescope :: ForallVis -> [TyVarBinder] -> ForallTelescope
[forallTelescopeVisibility] :: ForallTelescope -> ForallVis
[forallTelescopeBinders] :: ForallTelescope -> [TyVarBinder]

-- | Whether a type-variable binder was written as inferred or specified.
--   Examples: <tt>{a}</tt> versus <tt>a</tt>.
data TyVarBSpecificity

-- | <tt>{a}</tt> or <tt>{a :: k}</tt>
TyVarBInferred :: TyVarBSpecificity

-- | <tt>a</tt> or <tt>(a :: k)</tt>
TyVarBSpecified :: TyVarBSpecificity

-- | Whether a type-variable binder is visible or invisible. Examples:
--   <tt>a</tt> versus @<tt>a</tt>.
data TyVarBVisibility

-- | <pre>
--   a
--   </pre>
TyVarBVisible :: TyVarBVisibility

-- | @<tt>a</tt>
TyVarBInvisible :: TyVarBVisibility

-- | One type-variable binder. Examples: <tt>a</tt>, <tt>(a :: Type)</tt>,
--   <tt>{a}</tt>, and @<tt>k</tt>.
data TyVarBinder
TyVarBinder :: [Annotation] -> Text -> Maybe Type -> TyVarBSpecificity -> TyVarBVisibility -> TyVarBinder
[tyVarBinderAnns] :: TyVarBinder -> [Annotation]
[tyVarBinderName] :: TyVarBinder -> Text

-- | Optional kind annotation. Examples: <tt>(a :: Type)</tt> and <tt>{a ::
--   Type}</tt>.
[tyVarBinderKind] :: TyVarBinder -> Maybe Type

-- | Whether the binder was written as specified (<tt>a</tt>, <tt>(a ::
--   k)</tt>) or inferred (<tt>{a}</tt>, <tt>{a :: k}</tt>).
[tyVarBinderSpecificity] :: TyVarBinder -> TyVarBSpecificity

-- | Whether the binder was written visibly (<tt>a</tt>) or invisibly
--   (@<tt>a</tt>).
[tyVarBinderVisibility] :: TyVarBinder -> TyVarBVisibility

-- | A <tt>type</tt> synonym declaration. Example: <tt>type Pair a = (a,
--   a)</tt>.
data TypeSynDecl
TypeSynDecl :: BinderHead UnqualifiedName -> Type -> TypeSynDecl
[typeSynHead] :: TypeSynDecl -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName
[typeSynBody] :: TypeSynDecl -> Type

-- | Open or closed type synonym family declaration. Used for top-level
--   <tt>type family F a</tt> and associated <tt>type F a :: Kind</tt> in
--   class bodies. Examples: <tt>type family F a :: Type</tt> and <tt>type
--   family F a where F Int = Bool</tt>.
data TypeFamilyDecl
TypeFamilyDecl :: TypeHeadForm -> Bool -> Type -> [TyVarBinder] -> Maybe TypeFamilyResultSig -> Maybe [TypeFamilyEq] -> TypeFamilyDecl
[typeFamilyDeclHeadForm] :: TypeFamilyDecl -> TypeHeadForm
[typeFamilyDeclExplicitFamilyKeyword] :: TypeFamilyDecl -> Bool

-- | Family head type. For simple families like <tt>type family F a</tt>,
--   this is <tt>TCon <a>F</a></tt>. For infix families like <tt>type
--   family l <tt>And</tt> r</tt>, this is the full infix type.
[typeFamilyDeclHead] :: TypeFamilyDecl -> Type
[typeFamilyDeclParams] :: TypeFamilyDecl -> [TyVarBinder]

-- | Optional result signature, either an unnamed kind annotation (<tt>::
--   Kind</tt>) or a named result variable with injectivity annotation
--   (<tt>= r | r -&gt; a</tt>).
[typeFamilyDeclResultSig] :: TypeFamilyDecl -> Maybe TypeFamilyResultSig

-- | <tt>Nothing</tt> = open family; <tt>Just eqs</tt> = closed family with
--   equations
[typeFamilyDeclEquations] :: TypeFamilyDecl -> Maybe [TypeFamilyEq]

-- | One equation in a closed type family: <tt>[forall binders.] LhsType =
--   RhsType</tt> Example: <tt>forall a. F [a] = Maybe a</tt>.
data TypeFamilyEq
TypeFamilyEq :: [Annotation] -> [TyVarBinder] -> TypeHeadForm -> Type -> Type -> TypeFamilyEq
[typeFamilyEqAnns] :: TypeFamilyEq -> [Annotation]
[typeFamilyEqForall] :: TypeFamilyEq -> [TyVarBinder]
[typeFamilyEqHeadForm] :: TypeFamilyEq -> TypeHeadForm
[typeFamilyEqLhs] :: TypeFamilyEq -> Type
[typeFamilyEqRhs] :: TypeFamilyEq -> Type

-- | Data family declaration (standalone or associated in a class body).
--   Example: <tt>data family DF a :: Type</tt>.
data DataFamilyDecl
DataFamilyDecl :: BinderHead UnqualifiedName -> Maybe Type -> DataFamilyDecl
[dataFamilyDeclHead] :: DataFamilyDecl -> BinderHead UnqualifiedName

-- | Optional result kind annotation (<tt>:: Kind</tt>)
[dataFamilyDeclKind] :: DataFamilyDecl -> Maybe Type

-- | Type family instance: <tt>type [instance] [forall binders.] LhsType =
--   RhsType</tt> Example: <tt>type instance F Int = Bool</tt>.
data TypeFamilyInst
TypeFamilyInst :: [TyVarBinder] -> TypeHeadForm -> Type -> Type -> TypeFamilyInst
[typeFamilyInstForall] :: TypeFamilyInst -> [TyVarBinder]
[typeFamilyInstHeadForm] :: TypeFamilyInst -> TypeHeadForm
[typeFamilyInstLhs] :: TypeFamilyInst -> Type
[typeFamilyInstRhs] :: TypeFamilyInst -> Type

-- | Data or newtype family instance (standalone or in an instance body).
--   Examples: <tt>data instance DF Int = DFInt</tt> and <tt>newtype
--   instance DF Bool = DFBool Bool</tt>.
data DataFamilyInst
DataFamilyInst :: Bool -> [TyVarBinder] -> Type -> Maybe Type -> [DataConDecl] -> [DerivingClause] -> DataFamilyInst

-- | <tt>True</tt> when declared with <tt>newtype instance</tt>
[dataFamilyInstIsNewtype] :: DataFamilyInst -> Bool
[dataFamilyInstForall] :: DataFamilyInst -> [TyVarBinder]

-- | The LHS type-application pattern (e.g. <tt>GMap (Either a b) v</tt>)
[dataFamilyInstHead] :: DataFamilyInst -> Type

-- | Optional inline result kind annotation (<tt>:: Kind</tt>) before
--   <tt>=</tt> or <tt>where</tt>
[dataFamilyInstKind] :: DataFamilyInst -> Maybe Type
[dataFamilyInstConstructors] :: DataFamilyInst -> [DataConDecl]
[dataFamilyInstDeriving] :: DataFamilyInst -> [DerivingClause]

-- | A value binding.
data ValueDecl

-- | <pre>
--   f x y = body
--   </pre>
FunctionBind :: BinderName -> [Match] -> ValueDecl

-- | <tt>pat = body</tt> or <tt>%1 pat = body</tt>
PatternBind :: MultiplicityTag -> Pattern -> Rhs Expr -> ValueDecl
allKnownExtensions :: [Extension]
applyExtensionSetting :: ExtensionSetting -> [Extension] -> [Extension]
applyImpliedExtensions :: [Extension] -> [Extension]
binderHeadForm :: BinderHead name -> TypeHeadForm
binderHeadName :: BinderHead name -> name
binderHeadParams :: BinderHead name -> [TyVarBinder]
effectiveExtensions :: LanguageEdition -> [ExtensionSetting] -> [Extension]
extensionName :: Extension -> Text
memberExtension :: Extension -> ExtensionSet -> Bool
mkExtensionSet :: [Extension] -> ExtensionSet
extensionSettingName :: ExtensionSetting -> Text

-- | Get the result type from a GADT body
gadtBodyResultType :: GadtBody -> Type

-- | Get the set of extensions enabled by a language edition. These lists
--   are derived from GHC's DynFlags.languageExtensions. IMPORTANT: Keep
--   these in sync with GHC. The test suite validates this.
languageEditionExtensions :: LanguageEdition -> [Extension]
editionFromExtensionSettings :: [ExtensionSetting] -> Maybe LanguageEdition
noSourceSpan :: SourceSpan
mergeSourceSpans :: SourceSpan -> SourceSpan -> SourceSpan
mkName :: Maybe Text -> NameType -> Text -> Name
mkUnqualifiedName :: NameType -> Text -> UnqualifiedName
nameFromText :: Text -> Name
parseExtensionName :: Text -> Maybe Extension
parseExtensionSettingName :: Text -> Maybe ExtensionSetting

-- | Parse a language edition name (e.g., <a>Haskell2010</a>,
--   <a>GHC2021</a>).
parseLanguageEdition :: Text -> Maybe LanguageEdition
qualifyName :: Maybe Text -> UnqualifiedName -> Name
renderName :: Name -> Text
renderUnqualifiedName :: UnqualifiedName -> Text
unqualifiedNameFromText :: Text -> UnqualifiedName
moduleName :: Module -> Maybe Text
moduleWarningPragma :: Module -> Maybe Pragma
moduleExports :: Module -> Maybe [ExportSpec]

-- | Extract the class name from an instance head type by walking the
--   application spine down to the leftmost atom, peeling through
--   <a>TParen</a> and <a>TAnn</a> nodes.
--   
--   <pre>
--   &gt;&gt;&gt; fmap renderName $ instanceHeadName (TApp (TCon "C" Unpromoted) (TVar "a"))
--   Just "C"
--   
--   &gt;&gt;&gt; fmap renderName $ instanceHeadName (TInfix (TVar "a") ":=&gt;" Unpromoted (TVar "b"))
--   Just ":=&gt;"
--   </pre>
instanceHeadName :: Type -> Maybe Name

-- | Extract the type arguments from an instance head type.
--   
--   For prefix application spines like <tt>TApp (TApp (TCon C) a) b</tt>,
--   returns <tt>[a, b]</tt>. For infix heads like <tt>TInfix a op b</tt>,
--   returns <tt>[a, b]</tt>.
instanceHeadTypes :: Type -> [Type]
mkAnnotation :: Typeable a => a -> Annotation
fromAnnotation :: Typeable a => Annotation -> Maybe a

-- | Recursively strip all annotations from an AST value.
--   
--   Removes annotation wrapper constructors (e.g. <a>EAnn</a>,
--   <a>TAnn</a>, <a>PAnn</a>, <a>DeclAnn</a>) and replaces annotation
--   lists with <tt>[]</tt>. The traversal is bottom-up: children are
--   stripped before their parent, so nested annotation wrappers are fully
--   removed.
stripAnnotations :: Data a => a -> a
peelArithSeqAnn :: ArithSeq -> ArithSeq
peelClassDeclItemAnn :: ClassDeclItem -> ClassDeclItem
peelCmdAnn :: Cmd -> Cmd
peelCompStmtAnn :: CompStmt -> CompStmt

-- | Strip nested <a>DataConAnn</a> wrappers.
peelDataConAnn :: DataConDecl -> DataConDecl

-- | Peel nested <a>DeclAnn</a> wrappers.
peelDeclAnn :: Decl -> Decl
peelDoStmtAnn :: DoStmt body -> DoStmt body

-- | Peel nested <a>EAnn</a> layers (e.g. span-only dynamic annotations).
peelExprAnn :: Expr -> Expr
peelGuardQualifierAnn :: GuardQualifier -> GuardQualifier
peelInstanceDeclItemAnn :: InstanceDeclItem -> InstanceDeclItem

-- | Peel nested <a>PAnn</a> wrappers.
peelPatternAnn :: Pattern -> Pattern

-- | Peel nested <a>TAnn</a> wrappers (e.g. span-only dynamic annotations).
peelTypeAnn :: Type -> Type

-- | Peel <a>TAnn</a> then <a>TParen</a> (used when matching on type shape
--   under annotations and explicit parentheses).
peelTypeHead :: Type -> Type
literalAnnSpan :: SourceSpan -> Literal -> Literal
peelLiteralAnn :: Literal -> Literal
typeAnnSpan :: SourceSpan -> Type -> Type
instance GHC.Internal.Enum.Bounded Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Extension
instance GHC.Internal.Enum.Bounded Aihc.Parser.Syntax.LanguageEdition
instance GHC.Internal.Enum.Bounded Aihc.Parser.Syntax.NameType
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Annotation
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ArithSeq
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ArrAppType
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ArrowKind
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.BangType
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data name => GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data (Aihc.Parser.Syntax.BinderHead name)
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.CallConv
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data body => GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data (Aihc.Parser.Syntax.CaseAlt body)
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ClassDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ClassDeclItem
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Cmd
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.CompStmt
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DataConDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DataDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DataFamilyDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DataFamilyInst
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Decl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DerivingClause
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DerivingStrategy
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DoFlavor
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data body => GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data (Aihc.Parser.Syntax.DoStmt body)
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ExportSpec
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Expr
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Extension
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ExtensionSetting
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.FieldDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.FixityAssoc
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.FloatType
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ForallTelescope
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ForallVis
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ForeignDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ForeignDirection
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ForeignEntitySpec
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ForeignSafety
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.FunctionalDependency
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.GadtBody
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.GuardQualifier
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data body => GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data (Aihc.Parser.Syntax.GuardedRhs body)
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.IEBundledMember
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.IEBundledNamespace
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.IEEntityNamespace
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ImportDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ImportItem
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ImportLevel
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ImportSpec
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.InstanceDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.InstanceDeclItem
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.InstanceOverlapPragma
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.LambdaCaseAlt
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Literal
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Match
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.MatchHeadForm
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Module
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.ModuleHead
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.MultiplicityTag
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Name
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.NameType
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.NewtypeDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.NumericType
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.PatSynArgs
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.PatSynDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.PatSynDir
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Pattern
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Pragma
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.PragmaType
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.PragmaUnpackKind
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data a => GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data (Aihc.Parser.Syntax.RecordField a)
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data body => GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data (Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Rhs body)
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Role
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.RoleAnnotation
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.SourceSpan
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.StandaloneDerivingDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TupleFlavor
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TyVarBSpecificity
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TyVarBVisibility
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TyVarBinder
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.Type
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeBuiltinCon
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeFamilyDecl
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeFamilyEq
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeFamilyInjectivity
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeFamilyInst
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeFamilyResultSig
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeHeadForm
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeLiteral
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypePromotion
instance GHC.Internal.Data.Data.Data Aihc.Parser.Syntax.TypeSynDecl
